item.title: Just putting this here so it does not get lost
item.description: A sitting congressman, Ted Lieu, said on the record the Epstein files are being blocked because they show Trump raped and threatened to kill children. Keep sharing this so it doesn’t get buried.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: When you "pspsps" too close to the sun
item.description: It's a long video but there is a payoff at the end. Carson_bender didn't get a turkey, but he did get a legendary bap-pap (and did go to the hospital out of caution but only had shallow scratches)

item.title: Oklahoma Principal, Kirk Moore, getting crowned Prom King by the students he saved two weeks after taking down a would-be school shooter.

item.title: RFK Jr is a wise man
item.dc:creator: ChocolatePoopy

item.title: AI, and stupidity, kill a man who didn't have to die just yet. Welcome to the future.
item.description:
This will become a regular occurrence in the very near future. I'm reminded of Steven Jobs, who decided, without AI, that he knew better than his doctor who wanted to perform an immediate surgery which was certain to save his life.
https://www.newser.com/story/387286/he-warns-consumers-about-ai-his-dad-died-after-relying-on-it.html
item.dc:creator: TheCunningLinguists

item.title: Tim Curry celebrates his 80th birthday today
item.dc:creator: Pasquinelthe2nd

item.title: Saving Private Dump
item.description:
My favorite card game as a kid was pretending I was Gambit and throwing cards across the room
Comics can be anything you want them to be
Doc Savage and supporting goons
I doubt they are all sitting around singing “he’s got the whole world in his hands”
“A real hero. Like a man, but better. Swell, wouldn’t that be Super! I know, he’s a Super Man! Superman!” “An Ubermensch?” “Put a sock in it, they aren’t ready for that yet, it’s only the 30s!” -Siegel and Shuster probably
“Ok Bob, there’s all my ideas. What do you think?” “Shut the door on your way out.” -Finger and Kane probably
Sigh
Ah, I see, that’s what I’ve been doing
Slay
Slay
Conflict is their commodity, defend as peacefully as we can
I’d like to be this dapper
Good lord that’s horrifying, wanna go look for it?
Yaaaar… not that I even want the garbage they’re selling. Enshittification is part of the program, if you can’t even imagine a better world, you won’t know what you’re missing. The quality of our art is reducing the quality of our suffering or something like that
Legislate in your fursuit, i don’t care
What did you do Jared?
Don’t see enough representation for the Pacific islands
Guys, the world is broke, I have no idea how this happened
Throw me in a tree! Let the Vultures have me! Record the sound of my bones falling and sample it to a funky beat!
They both look happier
Oh Flash! Thanks for putting the world back, I’ve been meaning to do that. Missed Bolivia, brb
Everything can be sold to you, aesthetics, ideology, sweet giant white socks
I’ve never made a choice in my life, because in my search for free will I’ve found a chasm of desire for every choice simultaneously… Wait… I see something with bbq sauce and I’m feeling a little yeehaw. Ooo crunchy onions!
Supposedly this is what inspired Percy to write Ozymandias
Usagi!
Why I don’t have roommates
Except my buried Terracotta Army under my bed, gotta have those guys just in case
Please brain
Trying to tell myself this
I hate that American Psycho is the one I’ve watched most, but I’m trying to understand what ails us
Keep as many weirdos around you as possible. It’s safer in packs
Kitties sleep in cuddle piles. Lemme get the goop out of her eye, poor baby Have a good day fellow earthlings and visitors!
item.dc:creator: vagrantvigilantepunk

item.title: Am I using this right?
item.description: Gotta be careful which fart to trust. Edit: I'm not feeling too hot. So hopefully it's a sick shart and not an everyday from here on out shart. Edit edit :I'm glad we can all bond over this. Such a great community haha.

item.title: Animal Memes Vol 7
item.description: Turns out when I posted this ages ago I accidentally made it hidden. As always I'm clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd Miscellaneous and Videos https://imgur.com/gallery/0k0ca7O NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 818
item.description:
1
2
3
4
5
6
7
8
9

16
17
18
19
20
1`
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @NerdyPegger made this belt pouch. Such good work! Check their posts for more!
27 Man Tax: Jeremy Allen White
“The way I see it, if you want the rainbow you gotta be willing to put up with the rain.” - Dolly Parton So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Japan's Sakurajimas Stratovolcano has erupted
item.description: A stratovolcano, or composite volcano, is a steep-sided, conical volcano formed by alternating layers of viscous lava, ash, and volcanic rock. These volcanoes are common at subduction zones, making up ~60% of Earth's volcanoes. Known for explosive eruptions, they often form tall peaks like Mount Fuji and Mount St. Helens.
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: GovBrief Today #443
item.description: Sarah Raviani wanted it on the record that Representative Cory Mills bruised her face and arms. She called 911 at 1:15 AM. The responding officer's body camera recorded her bruises and her statement. Trump's acting U.S. Attorney refused to sign the arrest warrant a year ago. Because Raviani made sure the record existed, the Washington Post obtained that body camera footage and broke the story tonight. She's not the only one to accuse Mills. A different woman won a Florida protective order against him later that year, alleging he threatened to release explicit images of her and harm her future boyfriends. Mills still holds his House seat. Call your representative through 5 Calls and Resistbot and demand his expulsion. We've emailed 7,000+ stories over 443 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Embedded links, data, images at the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260418-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr18 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/board-iran-ships [3] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-psychedelics [4] https://go.govbrief.today/digenova-florida [5] https://go.govbrief.today/ballroom-appeal-sat [6] https://go.govbrief.today/mythos-omb-access [7] https://go.govbrief.today/police-mills Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Finally, Employment I'm proud of.
item.description: I've been working under the table in gross local kitchens for the last few months; just to stay afloat. Since covid, ~2000[1][2] restaurants in Toronto have gone under, making the field extremely competitive for tenured cooks and chefs. Finally landed a managerial gig at a restaurant rated as a "friend of Michelin," a restaurant that's entirely in my wheelhouse: Spanish cuisine, with an emphasis on charcuterie and pintxos. My chef believes in a 4 day workweek, along with free food and unlimited paid days off if you carry your weight. Days are still 11 hours, but being able to drop down from ~55hrs, to a 44hr workweek, with unlimited earned and paid days off is a godsend in this industry, especially as I approach 40yo. If anyone is struggling in this job market, don't ever forget your worth. Attack any opportunity, no matter how out of reach it seems. You never know, the stars and planets can align for you, and it only takes one Hail Mary to completely turn things around. Now. Time to execute. We got this. Bon service! [1] https://www.instagram.com/p/DWP3iUFjfGn/?__d=11 [2] https://www.ctvnews.ca/toronto/consumer-alert/article/4000-restaurants-in-canada-predicted-to-go-out-of-business-in-2026-forecast/
item.dc:creator: Kagenical

item.title: Skull mower
item.description: When you want the neighbors to know Halloween doesn't end at 12:00am November 1st ??. This is a custom skull mower a made a couple months back. Will have fun driving this around during Halloween this years
